title: 10 Signs You're Growing Into the Man God Made You to Be
caption:
Growth doesn't always feel like progress. Sometimes it feels like nothing. Like you're the same man you were six months ago, just more tired.

But there are signs — if you know what to look for. You apologize faster. The quiet doesn't scare you. You're harder on yourself than on everyone around you. Other men's wins don't wreck you anymore.

Those aren't small things. They're the real markers.

Save this for a week you feel like you're not moving.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #growth #discipleship #masculinity #humility #christianity
